message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Re-review: blocking items fixed, CI green">
Luca has addressed all blocking review items and CI is green. Reviewers who had blocking items — please re-review to verify your concerns are resolved:

- Steve Krug, Lea Verou, Steve Schoger: context headings/grouping
- Carson Gross: filter partial swap
- Heydon Pickering: focus management + visible label on context select
- Marty Cagan: your 2 blocking items

If satisfied, please send your consensus approval to luca-palmieri. Kent Beck and Scott Wlaschin already approved.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Since I already approved and had no blocking items, I don't need to re-review. Let me confirm my standing approval to the team lead.

input.content: Confirmed — my approval stands. I had no blocking items in my original review. The two Minor items I flagged (service-layer bypass in routes, authorization check in route handler) are non-blocking and can be addressed in a follow-up. Ready for consensus.

routing.content: Confirmed — my approval stands. I had no blocking items in my original review. The two Minor items I flagged (service-layer bypass in routes, authorization check in route handler) are non-blocking and can be addressed in a follow-up. Ready for consensus.

content.text: My approval stands from the original review. No re-review needed since I had zero blocking items — only 2 Minor suggestions and 3 Nice-to-have deferrals. Waiting for the other reviewers who had blocking concerns to verify their fixes.
